headline: USB vs. MTB: Which Regional Bank Stock Has Better Growth Potential?
summary: U.S. Bancorp or M&T Bank, which regional bank stock stands out amid digital expansion, lending momentum and valuation differences? Let us find out.

headline: Amid market tumult, Nexstar Media launches $2.75B leveraged loan backing Tegna buy
summary: Nexstar Media Group is out with a proposed $2.75 billion term loan B to finance its proposed acquisition of Tegna, according to sources. A lender call was held on the morning of March 9, and commitments to the BofA Securities–led deal are due Wednesday, March 18. Price talk for the seven-year TLB is S+275-300 with a 99 OID. At talk, the yield to maturity is around 6.77-7.04%. Lenders are offered six months of 101 soft call protection. There is no ticking fee for 60 days, and then the fee is 50%

headline: John Marshall Bank Hires Matthew Witt as VP, Commercial Lender to Grow and Support Alexandria Market
summary: RESTON, Va., March 09, 2026--John Marshall Bank ("JMB" or the "Bank"), subsidiary of John Marshall Bancorp, Inc. (the "Company") (Nasdaq: JMSB), is proud to announce that Matthew Witt will be joining the JMB team as VP, Commercial Lender in the Bank’s Alexandria market. In his role, he will work to further grow the Bank’s commercial portfolio in Alexandria and the surrounding areas while supporting and developing existing commercial relationships.
